data.name: Virtual Maid Streamer Ramie
data.detailed_description:
「Virtual Maid Streamer Ramie」是一個有選擇的新穎遊戲。

Story


男主角在學生時期碰巧遇見了剛出道的女僕Vtuber「天使拉米耶」所發布的影片後，拉開了一切的序幕。

他每天為了工作疲於奔命，就連活著都充滿了悲觀和負面情緒。
唯一能療癒心靈的，就是觀賞「天使拉米耶」的頻道。
原本只是一張插圖的拉米耶，因應技術的進步，讓他得以開始流暢地活動。
光是隔著螢幕看著她和各種不同的人溝通交流，並逐漸成長，似乎就為我增添了活力。

就在某一天，不知道為什麼，明明是虛擬世界居民的「天使拉米耶」，竟然越過了螢幕，出現在男主角面前……

――和給予他人活力又善於照顧人的女僕Vtuber一起度過開心又色情的同居生活，即將開幕！――

Character




天使拉米耶
CV：Hiiro Harusaki

以Vtuber身分活動的實習天使女僕，是頻道登錄人數逼近100萬人的頂尖Vtuber。

為了讓男主角歡笑，遠從虛擬世界飛奔而來。
個性有點呆，同時也是個擅長照顧別人的女生。

在虛擬世界活動時，曾因為男主角的鼓勵而找回活力，因此心懷感恩。
為了報恩，她決定和男主角一起生活。

Feature


・用E-mote製作流暢的角色動畫
・按路線劃分的結束語
・高質量的活動CG

Staff


・Character design：Itohana
・Script：Amamikabocha
・Producer：Jiro Shinagawa

data.short_description: 從螢幕中現身的Vtuber女生竟然是女僕！？　和想給男主角活力的Vtuber，一起度過充滿歡笑、淚水、還添加了一點令人心跳加速的色色生活戀愛冒險故事。
data.supported_languages:
英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 日文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows8.1/10/11 (Windows RT and 10 Mobile are not supported)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i Processor Series (Low Voltage Processor is not supported)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: HD Graphics 620
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: A sound card that supports DirectSound
  • 備註: Support Pixel Shaders 2.0 or higher required / A pointing device required
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows8.1/10/11 (Windows RT and 10 Mobile are not supported)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i Processor Series (Low Voltage Processor is not supported)
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GT 1030
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: A sound card that supports DirectSound
  • 備註: 1280x720px or higher / Support Pixel Shaders 2.0 or higher required / A pointing device required

data.name: Virtual Maid Streamer Ramie
data.detailed_description:
"Virtual Maid Streamer Ramie" is a novel game with choices.

Story


It all started when the protagonist randomly came across a video of the newly debuted maid Vtuber "Ramie Amatsuka." Our lonely hero was tired of his job and lost his lust for life, his only comfort being Ramie Amatsuka's live streams.

At first, she was just an illustration. However, through the wonders of technology, she started to be able to truly come to life.
Eventhough it was through the screen, just by watching her channel grow and how enthusiasticaly she chatted with her audience, he felt his spirits lift.

One day, Ramie Amatsuka, a former citizen of the virtual world, appeared in front of the protagonist by jumping through the screen...

"Spend time with the cheerful maid Vtuber who wants to take care of you. Your fun and raunchy room-sharing life begins now!"

Character




Ramie Amatsuka
CV：Hiiro Harusaki

An apprentice angel-maid who debuted as a Vtuber. Her channel has almost a million subscribers, she is one of the most popular Vtubers.

She is a little clumsy, but very caring girl who came out of the virtual world to make the protagonist smile.

When Ramie was just starting out and at a low point in her career, the protagonist was there for her with words of encouragement.
To repay his kindness, she left the virtual world and ended up living with him.

Feature


・Smooth character animation via the E-mote system.
・Endings for different routes.
・Breathtaking HD illustrations.

Staff


・Character design：Itohana
・Script：Amamikabocha
・Producer：Jiro Shinagawa

data.short_description: The Vtuber who came out of the screen was actually a maid!? Featuring the virtual maid who just wants to cheer the protagonist up. Follow this fluffy adventure with a little spice, full of charming moments and a few tears along the way.
data.supported_languages:
English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Japanese*
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows8.1/10/11 (Windows RT and 10 Mobile are not supported)
  • Processor: Intel Core i Processor Series (Low Voltage Processor is not supported)
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: HD Graphics 620
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
  • Sound Card: A sound card that supports DirectSound
  • Additional Notes: Support Pixel Shaders 2.0 or higher required / A pointing device required
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Windows8.1/10/11 (Windows RT and 10 Mobile are not supported)
  • Processor: Intel Core i Processor Series (Low Voltage Processor is not supported)
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GeForce GT 1030
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
  • Sound Card: A sound card that supports DirectSound
  • Additional Notes: 1280x720px or higher / Support Pixel Shaders 2.0 or higher required / A pointing device required
